# DeSlop

DeSlop is a public repo scanner for vague product copy and code residue that makes software look unwired or unfinished.

Public page: https://deslop.imagineqira.com/
Repository: https://github.com/TheArtOfSound/DeSlop

Core command:

```bash
npx -y github:TheArtOfSound/DeSlop -- .
```

Useful options:

```bash
npx -y github:TheArtOfSound/DeSlop -- . --json
npx -y github:TheArtOfSound/DeSlop -- . --fail-on high
npx -y github:TheArtOfSound/DeSlop -- . --min-score 90
```

Report contract:

- schemaVersion: 1
- summary score and counts
- category counts
- exact finding evidence
- fix direction for each finding

Rule categories:

- copy
- ux
- implementation
- security
- release-hygiene

Design constraint:

DeSlop does not claim to identify who wrote code. It checks visible repo evidence and reports specific findings with file, line, matched text, reason, and fix direction.
